notes: Documentation page using name=og:* instead of property=og:* and no og:type in the reduced snapshot.

normalized.title: Fetch API - Web APIs | MDN
normalized.description: The Fetch API provides an interface for fetching resources (including across the network). It is a more powerful and flexible replacement for XMLHttpRequest.

required_meta_tags.content: The Fetch API provides an interface for fetching resources (including across the network). It is a more powerful and flexible replacement for XMLHttpRequest.
The Fetch API provides an interface for fetching resources (including across the network). It is a more powerful and flexible replacement for XMLHttpRequest.
